title: JollyPack
description: A lightweight, vanilla-friendly modpack focused on boosting FPS and stability for private servers or easy installs, using essential mods for smooth performance.
body:
# JollyPack

**JollyPack** is a performance-boosting Minecraft modpack that enhances gameplay while staying true to the vanilla experience, minimizing changes to core mechanics. This pack offers key mods for better performance, smooth gameplay, and high FPS.

## Included Mods

1. [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
2. [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)
3. [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)
4. [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferritecore)
5. [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
6. [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
7. [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
8. [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)
9. [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)
10. [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
11. [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)
12. [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)
13. [Freecam (Modrinth Edition)](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam)

## Included Resource packs

1. [Redstone Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/redstone-tweaks)

## Important Notes

Each mod retains its original license, which may impose additional restrictions or permissions.
Redistribution of individual mods outside of this modpack must comply with the original licenses set by each mod's creator.
We does not claim ownership of the individual mods included in this modpack, and this modpack license only applies to the collection and structure as a whole.

Thank you for using **JollyPack**!
